package.name: drona_ros
package.description:
ROS2 Jazzy node implementations for D.R.O.N.A. Phase 2.
Each node is a thin transport wrapper around Phase 1 Python logic: advising_node - wraps drona.advising.engine.AdvisingEngine gesture_node - wraps drona.interaction.gesture_dispatcher.GestureDispatcher policy_node - action server wrapping LeRobot gesture-policy inference perception_node - wraps drona.perception.mediapipe_detector orchestrator_node - wraps drona.orchestrator.SessionMachine + Orchestrator
Zero new logic lives in this package. All algorithmic decisions remain in drona.* so Phase 1 unit tests continue to cover Phase 2 behaviour.
